/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/zit6_interfaces/zit6_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/zit6_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/zit6_interfaces/_zit6_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/origin/YouLong_AUV_Control_System/workspace_auv/build/zit6_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib libzit6_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libzit6_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so libzit6_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
